name: Question
description: Ask a question or seek help
labels: ["question", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        Have a question or need help? Check our [FAQ](https://github.com/mohamedMohana/openports/discussions) first, or [check existing issues](https://github.com/MohamedMohana/openports/issues) to see if someone has already asked it.
        
        Alternatively, please [open a discussion for it.
